compile_api.command: Read setup/outputs/core.txt, append '_api' to its content, write to setup/outputs/api.txt

compile_auth.command: Read setup/outputs/core.txt and setup/outputs/utils.txt, combine with '_auth', write to setup/outputs/auth.txt

link_backend.command: Read api.txt and auth.txt, combine with '_backend', write to setup/outputs/backend.txt

link_app.command: Read backend.txt and frontend.txt, combine with '_app', write to setup/outputs/app.txt

package.command: Read app.txt, wrap with 'PACKAGE[...]', write to setup/outputs/package.txt
